violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface - three door fidge - was not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Clean the rolling cart that the slicer is on.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50 ppm chlorine. - Primed machine twice.
